facts.value: : This visit with a FTF encounter with the patient in the home is not a visit of convenience. This home visit is necessary to prevent exacerbations of patient's ongoing medical condition. Patient is homebound, ambulates with hemicane, with poor endurance and balance, unsteady gait, generalized muscle weakness, fatigues easily, dyspnea with moderate exertion and consequently leaving home would require a considerable and taxing effort. It is safer for patient to be seen in their own environment in lieu of an office setting. Subjective Patient, Robert Bryant is an 71 year-old African American male, alert and oriented x4. He lives with roommates, in a 2 story home.
